track: A.2 hyperbolic (Lorentz) geometry — strong ranking loss, non-Euclidean decision geometry only
probe: lightgcn_hyperbolic.py emb64 L4 reg1e-4 seed42, uniform-unseen negatives, early-stop epoch 130
why_early_stop: Full 200ep probe hit NaN embedding collapse at epoch ~150-160 (3rd recurrence at same window); grad-clip+non-finite-skip prevented crash but masked collapse as loss=0, yielding 100% NaN scores. es130 captures the last healthy point BEFORE collapse for a clean read.

independent_verification.method: recomputed solo_acc / corr_z / eq_blend directly from score CSVs, not trusting summary.json
independent_verification.hyp_score_csv: 19996 rows, 0 NaN, 19988 unique finite values, range [-2.509, -0.001414] -> valid ranking, NOT degenerate
independent_verification.match: solo_acc and corr_z match exactly; eq_blend differs ~0.0025 (z-norm/tie-break) but same direction

verdict: Hyperbolic geometry IS a real ranking (0.717 > floor 0.684) and IS genuinely decorrelated from Euclidean (corr_z 0.747 < 0.9), so it is a DIFFERENT model — but it is WEAKER than emb128 (0.717 vs 0.765), and a parameter-free 50/50 z-blend DRAGS emb128 DOWN by -0.017. Diversity does not compensate for the weaker base. The last structurally-untested combination (strong loss + non-Euclidean geometry) adds no orthogonal value.
implication: Structural exploration EXHAUSTED. Every axis closed with evidence: SOTA families (graph/item/LM/VAE/capacity/hard-neg/ensemble), GPT-5.5-Pro levers (subset-loss/temporal/candidate-marginal/hours-confidence), boundary intrinsic-Bayes ceiling, 8-seed expansion (TIED), cross-capacity blend (TIED, public-confirmed -0.0003), and now hyperbolic geometry (redundant). emb128 4-seed (public 0.77745) remains the final #1.
